title: Death Among the Pines
overview: One night during a heavy rainstorm, a stranded stranger knocks on the door of Angela's country cottage, claiming his car has broken down. Angela lets him in to shelter but soon a police officer arrives, asking questions, amid conducting a manhunt for an escaped criminal. Angela puts two and two together, but is there more to it than meets the eye?
